description: A group of boys jostle in a crowded corridor, seemingly fighting or playfully pushing each other against a mirror.
Gary Valentine sits stiffly for a portrait in a school gymnasium while Alana Kane stands off to the side, observing with arms crossed.
A vintage hot dog stand glows under a vibrant sunset, with figures sitting at outdoor tables and bikes parked nearby.
Gary Valentine leans in close to talk to another young boy, their faces illuminated by the diner's warm, ambient light.
A large group of children in pajamas stand on a white cyc, posed and singing with adult stage director leading them.
A large indistinct crowd, silhouetted against stadium lights, slowly makes its way somewhere.
From a darkened doorway, Alana rapidly cleans a desk.
Alana searches under a cluttered bed in her bra and underwear.
Alana looks back nervously from the passenger seat of a convertible being driven at night.
Gary and Alana look at each other with subtle affection in a crowded hallway.
Alana walks down a street with a determined expression, moving towards something out of frame.
Gary looks pensively out of the car window while driving, bathed in golden light.
A lone figure sprints across a vast, empty agricultural field on a gloomy, overcast day.
A man speeds across a flat desert plain on a vintage motorcycle, kicking up dust.
A figure runs toward bright headlights in a dark field, illuminated by streetlights.
A man in a suit, face contorted in a wild scream, leans forward in apparent terror as he speeds along.
A bearded man holding a gas pump nozzle points a lit match toward the nozzle as Alana Kane looks on apprehensively at a gas station.
A man and a woman, perhaps Alana Kane, sprint hand-in-hand past a neon 'LOANS' sign at night.
A man and a woman, potentially Alana Kane, weave through a crowded outdoor space lit with strung lights at night.
A MUBI advertisement stating 'GET 30 DAYS FREE' in stark white text on a black background.
A lone girl walks down a sun-drenched school corridor, the distant figures hinting at a bustling day.
Teenagers mill in a crowded school hallway, their faces reflecting the uncertainty of youth.
A group of teenagers awkwardly stand together in a sunlit school hallway.
A young woman stands alone by a schoolyard, the sprinklers creating an ethereal glow.
Alana and Gary are walking at night, lit by streetlights, lost in their own world.
Alana Kane and Gary Valentine sprint across a beach, both smiling and full of youthful energy.
Gary Valentine, wearing a white suit with a red shirt, runs down a street underneath neon lights, potentially in a tense pursuit.
A woman sits inside a vintage movie theater ticket booth, framed by dark wood and maroon curtains.
A group of friends in a car are laughing, with Alana Kane among them, but overlaid text obscures the lower faces.
Alana Kane, in close-up, speaks intently into a vintage turquoise telephone, her expression fraught with concern.
Gary Valentine, with a serious expression, holds a telephone receiver close to his ear, seemingly troubled by the conversation.
A man rushes through an airport concourse, pursued by someone, from the movie Sleepless in Seattle.
People stroll past storefronts at night, in a scene from Sleepless in Seattle.
Hands gently stroke a teddy bear.
A woman sits in a car while a man standing outside places something into the back seat.
Streetlights illuminate the night on Genesta Street, next to some parked cars and a large truck parked on the right side.
The frame divides into two panels: Gary intensely kisses a girl in the front seat; in the back, Alana looks on with a worried expression.
Splitscreen frame: on the left, an illuminated truck at nighttime; on the right, Alana hauls a rope up a staircase in broad daylight.
Alana leans in intently, eyes locked on Gary, in a sun-drenched domestic interior.
Gary gazes upwards at Alana, who regards him with an ambiguous expression in a warm-toned interior.
Alana looks past someone out of focus and into the distance, a lawn with sprinklers behind her.
Gary Valentine wears a striped shirt as he looks sideways and talks to someone off camera, sprinklers misting in the background.
Alana stares pensively at the right of frame, a younger boy and Gary Valentine framed in the mirror on the right.
Alana looks intently at Gary Valentine, a younger boy looks down and out of focus to the left frame.
Alana makes her case forcefully across from Gary Valentine in the sunshine.
Gary Valentine sits at a restaurant table, gesturings with his hands as he speaks, a mix of nervous energy and earnest hope on his face.
Alana Kane sits across from Gary Valentine at a dimly lit restaurant table, looking directly at someone off-screen with a slight, curious smile.
Gary Valentine, seated, speaks with his hands clasped in front of him, a hopeful but slightly strained expression on his face in the dimly lit restaurant.
Across from Gary Valentine, Alana Kane maintains a slight smile with a direct gaze, her expression unreadable, in the low light of the restaurant.
Gary Valentine speaks intently, possibly making a pitch or explaining something important, in the golden light of the restaurant, with a dark figure looming to the right.
Alana Kane and Gary Valentine stand side-by-side on a dimly lit street, both looking directly at the camera with neutral expressions amidst looming shadows.
Alana Kane walks towards a suburban house at night, while a man dribbles a basketball near a vintage car in the driveway.
lighting: dim and suburban, porch light glow

description: Alana Kane lounges on a couch amidst family members, some awake and some asleep, in front of a patterned wallpaper.
A blonde woman with concern etched on her face peers from behind a partially opened door.

The Kane family, including Alana Kane, gathers around a dinner table bathed in candlelight, sharing a meal and conversation.
Alana Kane and Gary Valentine walk closely together at night outside a house, looking comfortable and perhaps a little somber.
Alana Kane stands in the background while two men in suits are arguing intensely in the foreground, creating a tense and awkward atmosphere.
A fraught encounter takes place, with Alana Kane entering a room and pushing past someone in a moment of heightened emotion or possible conflict.
Alana Kane peels out in a vintage turquoise convertible, with Gary Valentine riding shotgun, in a display of youthful rebellion and carefree energy.
